disclaimer: Geometric-match launch windows from real JPL DE440 ephemeris (via astropy). Dates are real and verifiable; the V_inf at departure column is the actual Lambert output at the matched date. C_3, time-of-flight, and TCM-budget cost columns are NOT computed - those require multi-lap propagation + ephemeris-mode optimisation (full M6 in cyclerfinder).
